Package fr.novaia.specialweek.controller

Class JeuController

java.lang.Object
fr.novaia.specialweek.controller.JeuController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/games") public class JeuController extends Object
REST controller for game content (quizz, anomalies, swiper, mytho).
